message.content: PASS. The red toast confirms "Utilisateur supprimé" (user deleted) with additional text "Rokia Keita a été supprimé. Journalisé dans l'audit." The table now shows 4 users (Amadou Touré, Drissa Coulibaly, Aminata Traoré, Moussa Diabaté) instead of the original 5, confirming the deleted user is no longer present.
